hypothesis: If a closed-loop Bayesian optimization framework autonomously navigates the multi-dimensional parameter space of reactive carbon electrolyzers, then it will identify optimal combinations of bicarbonate concentration, temperature, flow rates, KOH concentration, and applied current density that achieve higher CO2 reactor yields than those accessible through conventional researcher-guided experimentation, because machine learning–driven sequential experimental design more efficiently explores and exploits complex, nonlinear interactions among process variables.
